title: woodsia manchuriensis
intro: Woodsia manchuriensis, also known as Manchurian Woodsia or Manchurian Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Woodsia, a group of ferns that are often found in mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other secondary metabolites. The health benefits of Woodsia manchuriensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In traditional medicine, Woodsia manchuriensis is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and it is also used in the form of powder or extract for various health issues.
